candidate.title: Resnics DPU SmartNIC and NVMe-oF storage-offload structured fields

local_checks.repo_state: Planner evidence recorded a clean worktree before task-3 planning. Generator reused only local raw/wiki/data evidence and did not fetch external sources.
local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Searched local compute accelerator raw captures, source registry, structured catalog YAML, Compute Accelerator Crawl Inventory, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, r9 hardware gap proof, r10 task-2 gap proof, and Resnics/Yusur/Asterfusion/Corigine/Nebula raw captures for DPU, SmartNIC, NVMe-oF, storage offload, IOPS, latency, network bandwidth, PCIe, memory, power, source-backed, unresolved, duplicate boundary, aggregate, multi-variant, and blocked-source terms.
local_checks.wiki_search: Existing curated pages already had human-readable DPU/SmartNIC comparison rows and network/storage duplicate boundaries, but the structured catalog had resolved DPU/IPU network bandwidth only for NVIDIA BlueField-3 and Intel IPU E2100. It did not yet model storage IOPS or added-latency fields.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: The ai_infra index points to Compute Accelerator Spec Catalog, Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison, Field Glossary, Spec Sources, AI Infra Coverage Map, and Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure; no new page was needed.
local_checks.schema_scan: spec-fields.yaml supported network_bandwidth for dpu/ipu and common form factor, memory, host interface, and power fields. It lacked role-specific storage read/write IOPS and added-latency fields for DPU or storage-offload accelerators.
local_checks.completed_r10_boundaries: r10 task 1 recorded RAG propagation, drift, alerting, and cost blocked-source evidence; r10 task 2 resolved only Biren form-factor and peak-power fields and explicitly deferred DPU/SmartNIC IOPS and latency schema expansion.

gap_reason: The hardware layer still had a local-evidence-first gap: product-specific Resnics pages exposed DPU SmartNIC, NVMe-oF storage-offload values, and storage/offload engine boundaries with explicit units, while the structured catalog lacked SKU/resolved rows for those values and lacked narrow storage IOPS/latency schema fields. Promoting this slice improves hardware and network/storage product evidence without claiming benchmark, protocol, aggregate-system, or production-operations behavior.

duplicate_checks.finding: No existing resolved rows for resnics-stargate-n1025 or resnics-stargate-s1100 before this task.
Resnics N1025 and S1100 were already visible as raw comparison rows, so this task reused the same local raw paths and promoted only selected structured fields.

The network/storage page already separates DPU/SmartNIC product signals from SPDK protocol behavior and MLCommons benchmark claims; this task did not broaden product fields into architecture, benchmark, or incident claims.
Prior Biren task deferred DPU/SmartNIC IOPS and latency because the schema did not model those fields; this task handles that bounded deferred field class.

selected_source_backed_fields.source_boundary: Single product page for Stargate-N1025 DPU SmartNIC; network_bandwidth records the aggregate of the page's stated 2 x SFP28 25G data ports.

Single product page for Stargate-S1100 NVMe-oF storage accelerator; IOPS values are scoped to the page's stated 4K block size and 4 SSD performance line, and latency fields store stated upper-bound values from less-than source text.

rejected_or_deferred_fields.reason: The page has useful DPU SmartNIC fields, but this task kept the promoted set to N1025 plus S1100 to avoid broad catalog churn; N2025 remains a raw comparison row.

The pages expose useful DPU/NVMe-oF and low-latency values, but K2-Pro mixes chip and product-series rows and SWIFT-2200N is a low-latency product page without a fully promoted card schema boundary in this task.

The pages expose product and comparison values, but Helium includes model variants and NFV comparison rows while CX102S is a 1U gateway with 1 or 2 DPU modules, so neither was promoted as a single-card resolved row here.

rejected_or_deferred_fields.record: Corigine Agilio CX and Nebula DPU/RNIC/SNIC pages
rejected_or_deferred_fields.reason: Corigine remains useful PDF comparison evidence and Nebula local text extraction remains incomplete; neither was needed to satisfy the bounded Resnics field slice.
SPDK, MLCommons Storage, NCCL fabric blogs, HyperPod docs, and generic NVMe-oF descriptions are not used as product-specific card field evidence.

schema_extensions.rationale: Needed to preserve product-specific storage-offload read IOPS without overloading tensor compute or network bandwidth fields.
Needed to preserve product-specific storage-offload write IOPS for the source-stated block and SSD configuration.
Needed to store less-than read latency source text as an upper-bound value.
Needed to store less-than write latency source text as an upper-bound value.
